work_unit: PD-H002 fix: event-client.js terminal-state payload-only update audit-log gap
situation: audit-2026-07-03-013 finding PD-H002 (priority 2, kind route-fix) pending. event-client.js L172-179 updateEvent allowed payload-only updates on terminal events (e.g. observation_result after SUCCESS) but wrote no audit-log entry. Post-deploy observation appends were untraceable, violating DO B audit instrumentation requirement.
action: Added writeAuditLog import to event-client.js. In updateEvent terminal payload-only branch (after early-return guard for non-payload updates), inserted writeAuditLog call with auditAction='event-payload-update', resourceType='task-event', resourceId=existingEvent.id, details containing payloadKeys and terminalStatus. Added 'event-payload-update' key to ACTION_MAP in audit-log-helper.js mapping to schema action='update' sensitiveLevel='medium'. node --check passed for both files. Committed via opt-worktree.sh; reused existing opt-prod-deploy-1782970212 worktree (route-fix, no public interface touched).
outcome_evidence: worktree opt-prod-deploy-1782970212 pushed commit 9aea617 containing: event-client.js L15 import writeAuditLog, L180-187 writeAuditLog call in terminal payload-only branch; audit-log-helper.js L46-47 new ACTION_MAP key 'event-payload-update'. node --check returned 0 for both files. grep confirms writeAuditLog and event-payload-update present in worktree copy.
next_suggestion: Next pending by priority: PD-M002 (audit-log-helper ACTION_MAP missing 'cli-json-parse-failed'). After that PD-M005 (complete-task.js createEvent+updateTask non-atomic). Continue dispatching one fix per round from audit-2026-07-03-013 derived_fixes queue.
